EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IExtrude2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that can be used to take a geometry and connect it to a translated version of itself to generate a higher-dimensional geometry.

[Guid("177B5661-E873-47AC-AA42-2457FF6968F3")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IExtrude2 : IExtrude

Properties

GenerateNoBottoms

Indicates whether to generate bottom (from) face when extruding polygons.

bool GenerateNoBottoms { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
